series_metadata.series_title: Manufactured Home Park Development Approval Documentation
series_metadata.series_description: Records relating to the application for, grant or denial of, and extension of approval of manufactured home park development plans. This record series includes, but is not limited to, applications, development plans, grants or denials of approval, requests for amendment, and requests for extension.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: If an electronic version of the record exists, the paper copy shall be destroyed. If an electronic version of the record does not exist, then the paper record shall be retained until one year after the referenced manufactured home park is closed, the plans are superseded by approved development plans for the same manufactured home park, the approval of such plans expires, or the plan approval is denied, whichever is later. ; Electronic: The record shall be retained until one year after the referenced manufactured home park is closed, the plans are superseded by approved development plans for the same manufactured home park, the approval of such plans expires, or the plan approval is denied, whichever is later., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
